perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with a low-angle shot of a grey Hyundai SUV parked on a sunny city street. (2) The camera transitions to the interior, showing a male driver in a black polo shirt and baseball cap smiling. (3) A female character appears in the passenger seat, smiling and giving a thumbs up. (4) The camera focuses on the car's large central infotainment display showing a navigation map. (5) The screen then switches to a 360-degree surround-view parking camera system as the car moves. (6) The video ends with a shot of the interior dashboard and the driver.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, high-tempo electronic background music starts immediately. A high-pitched, excited female voice describes her manager's new car. (2) A male voice laughs and responds briefly with a lower, humble tone. (3) The female voice continues with high energy, reacting to the car's tech features. (4) Intermittent electronic beeping from the car's parking sensors is heard over the music. (5) Constant ambient noise of the car's engine idling and light street traffic is present throughout.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) 當你經紀人是一個有錢人 (When your manager is a rich person) - Hook. (2) 經紀人開新車！！！ (Manager drives a new car!!!) - Informative. (3) 買新車！！ (Buy a new car!!) - Emphasizing. (4) 你真的很很有錢欸！ (You are really rich!) - Dialogue reaction. (5) 哪有～ (No way) - Dialogue response. (6) 坐新車去錄影 (Riding in the new car to a recording session) - Contextual. (7) 導航變超大欸！ (The navigation is huge!) - Feature reaction. (8) 360度環景 (360-degree surround view) - Functional description. (9) 這個也太強了吧！ (This is too powerful!) - Impressed reaction. (10) 哇～～～～ (Wow~~~~) - Emotional exclamation.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro/Exterior reveal -> Character interaction -> Tech feature demonstration

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 female main character in passenger seat, 1 male manager driving
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: The woman has long brown hair and wears a light blue button-up shirt; the man wears a black polo shirt and a black baseball cap with a Mercedes-Benz logo.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A street in Taiwan with green trees, parked cars, and Traditional Chinese storefront signs visible through the windows.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Reveal -> Feature Highlight -> Summary
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video serves as a lifestyle vlog update where an influencer shares her excitement about her manager's new car. It aims to engage the audience through a mix of personal interaction and a soft showcase of the vehicle's modern technology features, like the large display and 360-camera system.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Detailed display of car features and positive reactions to the vehicle brand.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: High-frequency use of variety-show style text overlays and enthusiastic first-person narration.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video uses a relatable 'rich manager' trope to frame the product showcase, making the car features feel like an aspirational yet personal discovery.
